missingData.whyRequired: needed to replay source-over and separate bad blend math from bad inputs
needed to decide whether the source color supplied to the pass is wrong
needed to decide whether AA coverage, not color or blend, is wrong
needed to compare the pass output with independently replayed source-over
needed to identify inside/outside draw order or accumulation mistakes
needed to tie a sample to inside cover, outside cover, or another sub-draw role

classificationRules.coverage-aa-wrong: requires per-pixel/subdraw coverage or AA alpha compared with expected coverage
classificationRules.source-color-wrong: requires per-pixel/subdraw source color actually consumed by the pass
classificationRules.blend-source-over-wrong: requires source, coverage, destination-before, and independently replayed source-over output
classificationRules.draw-order-or-accumulation-wrong: requires after-each inside/outside subdraw state or equivalent accumulation trace
classificationRules.insufficient-per-subdraw-data: selected post-pass colors are known, but at least one required per-subdraw input for all four concrete root-cause classes is absent

minimalNextHook.scope: M60 F16 only, StencilCoverAaPolygonDraw only, exactly the 16 FOR-401 coordinates
minimalNextHook.implementationPoint: gpu-raster/src/main/kotlin/org/skia/gpu/webgpu/SkWebGpuDevice.kt around the StencilCoverAaPolygonDraw cover sub-draw execution
recordFields: expectedSourceOverRgbaFloat recomputed from the recorded inputs
minimalNextHook.successCriterion: each FOR-401 pixel can be assigned to coverage-aa-wrong, source-color-wrong, blend-source-over-wrong, or draw-order-or-accumulation-wrong without using FOR-400 as direct write proof

selectedPixels.classificationReason: FOR-401/FOR-405/FOR-406 prove the post-pass color already diverges, but the sources do not expose per-subdraw source color, AA coverage, destination-before, source-over replay, or inside/outside accumulation.

needed to identify inside/outside draw order or accumulation mistakes
needed to tie a sample to inside cover, outside cover, or another sub-draw role
